ActivityAlignment
ActivityAlignment adjusts the share of individuals in employment to values observed in the data.

CLASS TO MANAGE PRODUCTION AND SPECIFICATION OF CLONES TO FILL GAPS IN TAX DATABASE

CLASS FOR DEFINING COMBO-BOX FOR START YEAR SELECTION
Country
 
DatabaseExtension
 
DataParser
 
Dcpst
 
DecisionParams
CLASS TO STORE FIXED PARAMETERS FOR INTERTEMPORAL OPTIMISATION DECISIONS
DecisionTests
 
DemandAdjustment
The Demand Adjustment refers to the update of the initial labour demand at each time-step, which is derived from the equilibrium value of labour demand at the previous time-step with an adjustment to take into account such factors as population or income growth.
Dhe
 
Dhhtp_c4
 
DonorKeys
CLASS TO MANAGE TAX-UNIT KEYS FOR IMPUTING TAXES AND BENEFITS
DonorPerson
CLASS TO STORE PERSON-LEVEL DATA FOR IMPUTING TAXES AND BENEFITS
DonorPersonPolicy
CLASS TO STORE PERSON-LEVEL POLICY-DEPENDENT DATA FOR IMPUTING TAXES AND BENEFITS
DonorTaxImputation
CLASS TO MANAGE TAX IMPUTATIONS DRAWING ON DONOR DATA Imputations are made via a 3-step process: 1: obtain donor pool from full population by coarse-exact matching 2: obtain candidate pool from donor pool based on proximity to original income 3: select single candidate from donor pool or average over pool to impute disposable income
DonorTaxUnit
CLASS TO STORE DATA FOR IMPUTING TAXES AND BENEFITS
DonorTaxUnitPolicy
CLASS TO STORE TAX-UNIT-LEVEL POLICY-DEPENDENT DATA FOR IMPUTING TAXES AND BENEFITS
DoubleValuedEnum

EducationCSfilter
 
EducationEmployedCSfilter
 
EmploymentHistoryFilter
 
EmploymentStatistics
 
Ethnicity
 
Expectations

ExpectationsFactory
class to manage expansion of expectations to account for each successive state variable

FertilityAlignment
FertilityAlignment adjusts the probability of fertile women having a child to match total fertility rates implicit in population projections.

GenderWorkingCSfilter
 
Grid
CLASS TO STORE DATA FOR GRID ASSOCIATED WITH SINGLE OPTIMISATION VARIABLE
Grids
CLASS TO DEFINE GRIDS THAT STORE INTERTEMPORAL OPTIMISATION SOLUTIONS MODULES OF THE CLASS FACILITATE INPUT AND EXTRACTION OF OPTIMISED DATA AS WELL AS DESCRIPTIVE DETAIL OF DATA THE GRIDS ARE DEFINED AS ONE-DIMENSIONAL VECTORS ELEMENTS OF EACH VECTOR ARE ORGANISED TO REFLECT IMPLICIT DIMENSIONAL AXES SEE DEFINITION OF THE AXES ATTRIBUTE FOR DETAILS
GridScale
CLASS TO DEFINE GRID AXES
HealthStatistics
 
HealthStatus
 
HibernateUtil
CLASS TO MANAGE HIBERNATE SESSION FACTORY
HistogramTypeEnum
Specify JFreeChart's HistogramType for use in Observer class' Weighted_HistogramPlotter
Household
 
HouseholdStatus
 
IEvaluation
INTERFACE TO FACILITATE SWAPPING OF FUNCTIONS FOR NUMERICAL MINIMISATION ROUTINES
IKeyFunction
 
IncomeSource
 
Indicator
 
InitialPopulationFilter
Class filter to ensure that starting population for simulation matches alignment targets.
Innovations
 
InputDataSet
CLASS TO MANAGE STORAGE OF INPUT DATA
KeyFunction
WRAPPER CLASS TO CONSOLIDATE SWITCHING OF FUNCTION FOR EVALUATING DONOR KEYS TO IMPUTE TAX AND BENEFIT PAYMENTS
KeyFunction1
CLASS TO MANAGE ONE SPECIFICATION FOR EVALUATING DONOR KEYS USED TO IMPUTE TAX AND BENEFIT PAYMENTS
KeyFunction2
CLASS TO MANAGE ONE SPECIFICATION FOR EVALUATING DONOR KEYS USED TO IMPUTE TAX AND BENEFIT PAYMENTS
KeyFunction3
CLASS TO MANAGE ONE SPECIFICATION FOR EVALUATING DONOR KEYS USED TO IMPUTE TAX AND BENEFIT PAYMENTS
KeyFunction4
CLASS TO MANAGE ONE SPECIFICATION FOR EVALUATING DONOR KEYS USED TO IMPUTE TAX AND BENEFIT PAYMENTS
Labour
An enumeration representing different categories of weekly labour supply (work hours) provided by persons.
LabourMarket
 
Les_c4

Les_transitions_FX1

LocalExpectations
 
MahalanobisDistance
MahalanobisDistance is a class for computing the Mahalanobis distance for a given data point with respect to a dataset.
MaleAgeGroupCSfilter
 
MaleAgeGroupEducationCSfilter
 
MaleRegionAgeCSfilter
 
MaleRegionCSfilter
 
ManagerFileGrids
CLASS TO MANAGE INTERACTIONS BETWEEN THE IO GRIDS AND THE LOCAL FILE SYSTEM
ManagerPopulateGrids
CLASS TO MANAGE IDENTIFICATION OF LOOK-UP TABLE FOR INTERTEMPORAL OPTIMISATION DECISIONS THE LOOK-UP TABLE IS REFERRED TO THROUGHOUT AS THE 'GRIDS'
ManagerRegressions
CLASS TO MANAGE EVALUATION OF SUPPLEMENTARY DATA FOR INTERACTING WITH JAS-MINE REGRESSION METHODS
ManagerSolveGrids
CLASS TO MANAGE EVALUATION OF SOLUTIONS TO POPULATE INTERTEMPORAL OPTIMISATION GRIDS THE SOLUTION PROCEDURE RUNS THROUGH ALL STATE COMBINATIONS DESCRIBED BY THE GRIDS VIA FOUR NESTED LOOPS THE FIRST (OUTER-MOST) LOOP CONSIDERS SLICES OF THE GRIDS DISTINGUISHED BY AGE THIS IS MOTIVATED BY THE USE OF BACKWARD INDUCTION TECHNIQUES BY THE SOLUTION METHOD THE SECOND LOOP CONSIDERS COMBINATIONS OF CHARACTERISTICS, FOR WHICH EXPECTATIONS ARE EXOGENOUS OF CONTROL VARIABLES THIS ALLOWS EVALUATIONS FOR EXPECTATIONS OVER THESE VARIABLES TO BE DONE ONCE FOR ALL COMBINATIONS OF STATES CONSIDERED IN THE INNER TWO LOOPS STATES IN THIS LOOP ARE IDENTIFIED BY AXES[aa][ii][4] = 0 OR 0.5 THE THIRD LOOP IS PARALLISED TO TAKE FULL ADVANTAGE OF COMPUTING RESOURCES THE FOURTH (INNER-MOST) LOOP IS SEPARATED FROM THE THIRD LOOP ONLY TO ECONOMISE THE OVER-HEAD ASSOCIATED WITH PARALLELISATIONS
ManagerSolveState
CLASS TO MANAGE EVALUATION OF NUMERICAL SOLUTIONS FOR SPECIFIC STATE COMBINATION MANAGER EVALUATES THE FEASIBLE DISCRETE CONTROLS, AND OBTAINS SOLUTIONS FOR ALL CONTINUOUS CONTROLS FOR EACH FEASIBLE COMBINATION OF DISCRETE CONTROLS.
MapBounds
 
Match
CLASS TO STORE INDIVIDUAL DATABASE MATCHES
Matches
CLASS TO STORE SETS OF DATABASE MATCHES
MatchFeature
 
MatchIndices
CLASS TO STORE MATCHING INDICES TO ASSIST EXPANSION OF TAX DATABASE INPUT DATA
MatchIndicesSet
CLASS TO STORE SET OF MATCHINDICES TO ASSIST EXPANSION OF TAX DATABASE INPUT DATA
MessageConsole
 
Minimiser
CLASS TO EVALUATE FUNCTION MINIMISATIONS
MultiValEvent<E extends microsim.statistics.regression.IntegerValuedEnum>
MultiValEvent class assists evaluation of multinomial events
NotPartnerInformalCarer
 
Occupancy
 
Parameters
CLASS TO STORE MODEL PARAMETERS FOR GLOBAL ACCESS
PartnershipAlignment
PartnershipAlignment adjusts the probability of individuals forming a union to match the simulated proportion of the population in a partnership to values observed in the data.

Processed
CLASS TO STORE REFERENCES DESCRIBING STARTING POPULATIONS THAT HAVE BEEN EVALUATED PREVIOUSLY
Quadrature
OBJECT TO EVALUATE AND STORE ABSCISSAE AND WEIGHTS FOR GAUSS HERMITE QUADRATURE TOOL FOR APPROXIMATING EXPECTATIONS, OF STANDARD NORMAL DISTRIBUTION (MEAN 0, STDEV 1) BETWEEN -INF AND +INF CODE BASED ON Numerical Recipes, 1987, CHAPTER 4

TaxDonorDataParser
CLASS TO MANAGE TRANSLATION OF CSV DATA FROM EUROMOD TO DATABASE FOR DONORS USED TO IMPUTE TAX AND BENEFIT PAYMENTS csv data are processed and saved to the DONORPERSON_country code table in the relational database.
TaxEvaluation
CLASS TO MANAGE EVALUATION OF TAX AND BENEFIT PAYMENTS Combines imputation from the "taxes" module with functions included in this object

Tests class is run at the end of each year and subjects the population to a number of tests designed to ensure data validity
